sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48742" key="qhri/ambos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θηρίαμβος</orth>, coined as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θρίαμβος</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
